sections.name: background
sections.description: Context, prior work, motivation, or historical framing that explains the broader setting of the work.

fields.name: literature_context
fields.description: Relevant literature or research context framing the work.

fields.name: historical_context
fields.description: Historical or longitudinal context relevant to the work.

fields.name: motivation
fields.description: Why the work was undertaken.

fields.name: related_work
fields.description: Specific mention of related methods or comparable studies.

sections.name: problem
sections.description: Why the work exists and what it is trying to solve.

fields.name: problem_statement
fields.description: Core problem or gap addressed by the document.

fields.name: problem_types
fields.description: Short problem category labels.

fields.name: primary_goal
fields.description: Main goal or intended outcome.

fields.name: secondary_goals
fields.description: Secondary goals or supporting aims.

sections.name: scope
sections.description: The boundaries and applicability of the work across geography, time, population, or domain.

fields.name: geographic_scope
fields.description: Geographic area or spatial scope covered by the work.

fields.name: temporal_scope
fields.description: Time horizon or temporal scope of the work.

fields.name: domain_scope
fields.description: Subject-matter or application domain boundaries.

fields.name: exclusions
fields.description: Explicit exclusions, non-goals, or out-of-scope items.

sections.name: methods
sections.description: How the work is carried out.

fields.name: method_type
fields.description: High-level method family.

fields.name: techniques
fields.description: Concrete techniques, tools, or steps used.

fields.name: workflows
fields.description: Operational workflow or process followed in the method.

fields.name: model_details
fields.description: Model architecture, settings, or analytical details.

sections.name: data
sections.description: Information about datasets, collection processes, provenance, quality, and access.

fields.name: data_sources
fields.description: Origin or provenance of the data.

fields.name: collection_protocols
fields.description: How the data was collected or labeled.

fields.name: data_quality
fields.description: Statements about data quality, coverage, or limitations.

fields.name: licensing
fields.description: Licensing or usage conditions attached to the data.

fields.name: accessibility
fields.description: How accessible the data is to others.

sections.name: evaluation
sections.description: How the work is assessed or validated.

fields.name: evaluation_methods
fields.description: Evaluation approach used to assess the work.

fields.name: benchmarks
fields.description: Benchmarks, baselines, or comparison targets.

fields.name: validation_strategy
fields.description: Validation setup or experimental design.

fields.name: success_criteria
fields.description: Criteria that define success for the work.

sections.name: results
sections.description: What the work produces or achieves.

fields.name: outputs
fields.description: Main outputs such as datasets, models, or recommendations.

fields.name: findings
fields.description: Key substantive findings or conclusions.

fields.name: evaluation_metrics
fields.description: Metrics or evaluation criteria used.

fields.name: performance_summary
fields.description: Summary of model or system performance.

sections.name: governance
sections.description: Oversight, compliance, accountability, and coordination mechanisms surrounding the work.

fields.name: compliance_requirements
fields.description: Rules, regulations, or compliance obligations tied to the work.

fields.name: oversight_mechanisms
fields.description: Formal oversight or review mechanisms.

fields.name: accountability_structures
fields.description: Who is accountable and how accountability is organized.

fields.name: coordination_policies
fields.description: Policies or practices coordinating actors or institutions.

sections.name: risk
sections.description: Potential harms, failures, or negative consequences associated with the work.

fields.name: operational_risks
fields.description: Operational or implementation risks.

fields.name: societal_risks
fields.description: Risks to communities, users, or broader society.

fields.name: environmental_risks
fields.description: Risks or harms to ecosystems and the environment.

fields.name: security_risks
fields.description: Security, misuse, or adversarial risks.

sections.name: constraints
sections.description: Practical, legal, ethical, or operational limitations affecting the work.

fields.name: legal_constraints
fields.description: Legal or regulatory constraints.

fields.name: ethical_considerations
fields.description: Ethical issues, harms, or safeguards.

fields.name: data_governance
fields.description: Data handling, stewardship, or access governance.

fields.name: deployment_constraints
fields.description: Operational or implementation constraints.

fields.name: resource_limitations
fields.description: Resource limits such as compute, staff, budget, or time.

sections.name: stakeholders
sections.description: Who is involved in, affected by, or expected to use the work.

fields.name: actors
fields.description: Organizations or actors involved in the work.

fields.name: beneficiaries
fields.description: Groups that benefit from the work.

fields.name: affected_groups
fields.description: Groups directly affected by the system or intervention.

fields.name: decision_makers
fields.description: People or institutions making decisions using the work.

sections.name: deployment
sections.description: How mature the work is and whether it can scale.

fields.name: deployment_stage
fields.description: Theoretical, prototype, pilot, or deployed stage.

fields.name: scalability_notes
fields.description: Scalability and implementation readiness notes.

fields.name: integration_requirements
fields.description: Requirements for integrating the work into existing systems or processes.

fields.name: operational_readiness
fields.description: Readiness for operational or real-world use.

sections.name: impact
sections.description: The broader effects or expected outcomes of the work on society, environment, policy, or economy.

fields.name: societal_impact
fields.description: Expected or observed effects on society or communities.

fields.name: ecological_impact
fields.description: Expected or observed environmental or ecological effects.

fields.name: economic_impact
fields.description: Economic benefits, costs, or productivity effects.

fields.name: policy_impact
fields.description: Influence on policy, regulation, or governance decisions.

sections.name: recommendations
sections.description: Suggested actions, future directions, policy guidance, or implementation advice derived from the work.

fields.name: policy_recommendations
fields.description: Recommendations directed at policy or governance actors.

fields.name: future_work
fields.description: Suggested future research or development directions.

fields.name: implementation_guidance
fields.description: Practical guidance for implementation or adoption.

fields.name: strategic_actions
fields.description: Strategic actions suggested by the work.

sections.name: limitations
sections.description: Explicit weaknesses, uncertainties, assumptions, or acknowledged gaps in the work.

fields.name: limitations_summary
fields.description: Summary of the main limitations.

fields.name: uncertainty_sources
fields.description: Sources of uncertainty or ambiguity in the work.

fields.name: assumptions
fields.description: Core assumptions the work depends on.

fields.name: known_gaps
fields.description: Known gaps or unresolved issues.

sections.name: monitoring
sections.description: Mechanisms for ongoing tracking, auditing, compliance checking, or continuous assessment.

fields.name: monitoring_methods
fields.description: Methods for ongoing monitoring or tracking.

fields.name: audit_processes
fields.description: Audit or review procedures.

fields.name: compliance_tracking
fields.description: How compliance is tracked over time.

fields.name: reporting_protocols
fields.description: Reporting procedures or protocols.

sections.name: alignment_signal
sections.description: Explicit statements connecting research outcomes to policy goals, governance priorities, societal objectives, or sustainability frameworks.

fields.name: referenced_frameworks
fields.description: Named frameworks, standards, or agendas referenced by the work.

fields.name: policy_links
fields.description: Direct links between the work and policy goals or mandates.

fields.name: sdg_alignment
fields.description: References to UN Sustainable Development Goals or similar targets.

fields.name: governance_alignment_statements
fields.description: Explicit statements tying the work to governance priorities.
